efficacyPairs.questionText:
Find the letter that completes both pairs of words:

CA ( ? ) EN
BU ( ? ) ANK
efficacyPairs.subConceptName: When the Shared Letter Is a Consonant
efficacyPairs.lessonTeachSummary: Look at **CU(?)AP and FA(?)ALL**. You definitely don't need to try all 21 consonants! Find the restrictive word (the pair where fewest letters work) — it usually narrows things down to just 2 or 3 opt
lessonLearningGoal: Track down a shared consonant hiding between word pairs
Why the restrictive-word trick is your best friend with consonants

Learn why unusual letter patterns are your best clue — they're the most restrictive
